ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic sensor */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the sensor */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "data_update_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the sensor updates its data */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the signal */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the signal location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the signal location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was installed */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal */,
  "timing_plan" TEXT /* Timing plan of the signal */,
  "cycle_length" INTEGER /* Length of the signal cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incident */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the condition */,
  "measurement_tstamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "speed" REAL /* Current speed on the road */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed on the road */,
  "reference_speed" REAL /* Reference speed for the road */,
  "travel_time_seconds" REAL /* Travel time in seconds */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the measurement */,
  "cvalue" REAL /* Additional value (if applicable) */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Current traffic volume on the road */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the road */,
  "travel_time_index" REAL /* Travel time index of the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_conditions_tmc_code FOREIGN KEY ("tmc_code") REFERENCES traffic_sensors ("tmc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the flow */,
  "start_tstamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the flow period */,
  "end_tstamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the flow period */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the flow period */,
  "flow_rate" INTEGER /* Flow rate of traffic on the road */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of traffic on the road */,
  "speed_variance" REAL /* Variance of traffic speed on the road */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flow_tmc_code FOREIGN KEY ("tmc_code") REFERENCES traffic_sensors ("tmc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signal_control" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal control */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the control */,
  "start_tstamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the control period */,
  "end_tstamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the control period */,
  "signal_plan" TEXT /* Traffic signal plan during the control period */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of control */,
  "timing_offset" INTEGER /* Timing offset of the control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signal_control_tmc_code FOREIGN KEY ("tmc_code") REFERENCES traffic_signals ("tmc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signal_timing" (
  "timing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal timing */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the timing */,
  "start_tstamp" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the timing period */,
  "end_tstamp" TEXT /* End timestamp of the timing period */,
  "timing_plan" TEXT /* Traffic signal timing plan during the timing period */,
  "timing_type" TEXT /* Type of timing */,
  "cycle_offset" INTEGER /* Cycle offset of the timing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signal_timing_tmc_code FOREIGN KEY ("tmc_code") REFERENCES traffic_signals ("tmc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incident_response" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being responded to */,
  "response_tstamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incident_response_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_tstamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the system was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic event */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic event */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the traffic event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the traffic event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the traffic event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic weather condition */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the weather condition */,
  "weather_type" TEXT /* Type of weather */,
  "weather_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the weather condition */,
  "weather_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the weather condition */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_roadwork" (
  "roadwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic roadwork */,
  "tmc_code" TEXT /* TMC (Traffic Message Channel) code for the roadwork */,
  "roadwork_type" TEXT /* Type of roadwork */,
  "roadwork_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the roadwork */,
  "roadwork_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the roadwork */,
  "roadwork_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the roadwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roadwork_id")
)
